ewmedieval.advancement.root.desc: Welcome to the world of EwMedieval.
ewmedieval.advancement.plant_all_crops.d: Plant every crop in the land.
ewmedieval.advancement.tin_ingot.desc: Smelt your tin into an ingot.
ewmedieval.advancement.edhel_steel.desc: Craft the refined alloy of the Edhel.
ewmedieval.advancement.khazad_steel.desc: Forge the legendary steel of the Dwarves.
ewmedieval.advancement.burzum_steel.desc: Craft the dark alloy of Burzum.
ewmedieval.advancement.mithril.desc: Obtain mithril, the rarest metal in the land.
ewmedieval.advancement.bronze_mixture.de: Mix tin and copper into a bronze mixture.
ewmedieval.advancement.bronze_ash_mixtur: Mix bronze with ash to create something new.
ewmedieval.advancement.crude_ingot.desc: Smelt a crude ingot from bronze ash mixture.
ewmedieval.advancement.silver.desc: Unearth raw silver from the depths.
ewmedieval.advancement.get_knife.desc: Craft a knife — a tool for hunting, harvesting, and the hearth alike.
ewmedieval.advancement.get_seed.desc: Obtain a seed and prepare to grow something.
ewmedieval.advancement.plant_crop.desc: Plant your first crop in the earth.
ewmedieval.advancement.earlyforge.desc: Build a primitive forge and begin working metals.
ewmedieval.advancement.forge.desc: Construct a true forge, worthy of a master smith.
ewmedieval.advancement.cutting_board.des: Place a cutting board and prepare your ingredients properly.
ewmedieval.advancement.get_fur.desc: Skin your prey and collect fur from the wild.
ewmedieval.advancement.stove.desc: Build a stone stove for more serious cooking.
ewmedieval.advancement.get_straw.desc: Use a knife to cut grass and gather straw.
ewmedieval.advancement.craft_rope.desc: Twist straw into a length of rope.
ewmedieval.advancement.grow_avocado.desc: Plant an avocado pit and wait for a tree to grow.
ewmedieval.advancement.harvest_avocado.d: Harvest a ripe avocado from a tree you grew yourself.
ewmedieval.advancement.stone_age.desc: Gather the raw materials of the earliest civilization.
ewmedieval.advancement.grand_feast.desc: Set out a proper feast for all to share.
ewmedieval.advancement.get_unripe_cheese: Make an unripe cheese wheel and let it age.
Age and collect every variety of cheese wheel.
ewmedieval.advancement.sweet_spread.desc: Lay out a dessert table fit for a king.
ewmedieval.advancement.feel_nourished.de: Gain the Nourishment effect from a balanced diet.
ewmedieval.advancement.feel_comfort.desc: Gain the Comfort effect from a truly satisfying meal.
ewmedieval.advancement.harvest_tomato.de: Harvest a rope-grown tomato with a knife.
ewmedieval.advancement.light_campfire.de: Place a campfire to start cooking.
ewmedieval.advancement.master_chef.desc: Eat every hearty dish the realm has to offer.

block.ewmedieval.rice.invalid_placement: This crop won't survive well outside shallow water.
block.ewmedieval.feast.use_container: You need a %s to eat this.
block.ewmedieval.cheese.feast.use_knife: Use a knife to cut this cheese

tooltip.ewmedieval.horse_feed.when_feedi: When fed to a tamed mount:
tooltip.ewmedieval.tongs.1: Prevent players from burning themselves when
tooltip.ewmedieval.tongs.2: handling hot metals by holding it in your hand.
